name: Requests
description: Simple, elegant HTTP library for Python. The de facto standard for making HTTP calls with a clean API.

name: HTTPX
description: Async-capable HTTP client for Python. Drop-in requests replacement with HTTP/2, connection pooling, and streaming.

name: Axios
description: Promise-based HTTP client for browser and Node.js. Interceptors, automatic JSON transforms, and cancellation.

name: reqwest
description: Ergonomic async HTTP client for Rust. TLS, cookies, JSON, multipart uploads, and connection pooling built in.

name: curl
description: Command-line tool for transferring data with URLs. Supports HTTP, FTP, and dozens of other protocols.

name: Wget
description: Non-interactive network downloader. Recursive downloads, retry on failure, and background operation.

name: Got
description: Human-friendly HTTP request library for Node.js. Supports retries, streams, pagination, and HTTP/2.

name: Ky
description: Tiny HTTP client based on the Fetch API for browsers and Deno. Retries, JSON shortcuts, and timeout handling.

name: Undici
description: High-performance HTTP/1.1 client for Node.js. Written from scratch, powers Node.js built-in fetch implementation.

name: OkHttp
description: Efficient HTTP and HTTP/2 client for Java and Kotlin. Connection pooling, transparent GZIP, and response caching.

name: Retrofit
description: Type-safe REST client for Java and Kotlin by Square. Turns HTTP APIs into Java interfaces with annotation-based config.

name: Beautiful Soup
description: Python library for pulling data out of HTML and XML. Forgiving parser that handles messy real-world markup.

name: Cheerio
description: Fast, lean jQuery-like API for server-side HTML parsing. Scrape and manipulate markup in Node.js.

name: Scrapy
description: Fast, high-level web crawling and scraping framework for Python. Handles requests, parsing, and data pipelines.

name: lxml
description: High-performance XML and HTML parsing library for Python. XPath, XSLT, and schema validation with C-level speed.

name: jsoup
description: Java HTML parser for extracting and manipulating data using DOM, CSS selectors, and jQuery-like methods.

name: Colly
description: Elegant scraping framework for Go. Manages cookies, caching, rate-limiting, and parallel requests automatically.

name: Crawlee
description: Web scraping and browser automation library for Node.js. Handles proxy rotation, headless browsers, and anti-blocking.

name: Mechanize
description: Stateful programmatic web browsing library for Python. Handles cookies, forms, and redirects like a real browser.

name: goquery
description: jQuery-like HTML parsing and manipulation library for Go. CSS selector-based querying on parsed HTML documents.

name: Nokogiri
description: Ruby gem for parsing HTML, XML, SAX, and Reader. XPath and CSS selector support with libxml2 performance.

name: Flask
description: Lightweight Python web microframework. Minimal core with extensions for forms, auth, databases, and more.

name: Axum
description: Ergonomic Rust web framework built on Tokio and Tower. Type-safe extractors, middleware, and composable routing.

name: Gin
description: High-performance HTTP web framework for Go. Martini-like API with up to 40x faster performance. Middleware support.

name: Echo
description: High-performance, minimalist Go web framework. Built-in middleware, data binding, and HTTP/2 support.

name: Fiber
description: Express.js-inspired Go web framework built on fasthttp. Optimized for speed and low memory footprint.

name: chi
description: Lightweight, composable Go HTTP router. Built on net/http, supports middleware, and context-based routing.

name: Remix
description: Full-stack React framework focused on web standards. Nested routes, progressive enhancement, and server-side rendering.

name: Nuxt
description: Full-stack Vue.js framework with server-side rendering, auto-imports, file-based routing, and data fetching built in.

name: SolidJS
description: Reactive JavaScript framework with fine-grained reactivity and no virtual DOM. Compiles to efficient vanilla JS.

name: Hono
description: Ultrafast web framework for the edge. Runs on Cloudflare Workers, Deno, Bun, Fastly, and Node.js.

name: Elysia
description: TypeScript web framework optimized for Bun. End-to-end type safety, high throughput, and ergonomic API design.

name: Actix Web
description: Powerful, pragmatic, and extremely fast web framework for Rust. Type-safe, async, with built-in HTTP/2 and WebSocket support.

name: Phoenix
description: Elixir web framework for real-time apps. Channels for WebSockets, LiveView for interactive UIs, runs on the Erlang VM.

name: Spring Boot
description: Java framework for production-grade Spring applications. Auto-configuration, embedded servers, and opinionated defaults.

name: Laravel
description: PHP web framework with elegant syntax. Routing, ORM, queues, auth, and testing built in. Large ecosystem of first-party packages.

name: NestJS
description: Progressive Node.js framework with TypeScript. Angular-inspired architecture with modules, dependency injection, and decorators.

name: Koa
description: Next-generation Node.js web framework by the Express team. Smaller, more expressive, async/await-native middleware stack.

name: Rocket
description: Rust web framework focused on ease of use, expressiveness, and speed. Type-safe routing, built-in templating, and testing tools.

name: Fresh
description: Next-gen web framework for Deno. Island-based architecture with zero JS shipped to the client by default.

name: Angular
description: Google's TypeScript framework for scalable web apps. Dependency injection, RxJS, two-way binding, and a full CLI.

name: Preact
description: Fast 3 KB alternative to React with the same modern API. Lightweight virtual DOM and hooks support.

name: Qwik
description: Resumable framework that eliminates hydration. Lazy-loads JS at interaction time for instant page loads.

name: Alpine.js
description: Minimal reactive framework for composing behavior directly in HTML markup. 15 attributes, no build step required.

name: Lit
description: Google-backed library for building web components. 5 KB, reactive properties, declarative templates, and Shadow DOM.

name: htmx
description: Access AJAX, WebSockets, and SSE directly from HTML attributes. No JavaScript required for interactive UIs.

name: Socket.IO
description: Real-time bidirectional event-based communication for Node.js. WebSocket with automatic fallback and rooms.

name: Pusher
description: Hosted APIs for realtime messaging, notifications, and in-app chat. Channels for pub/sub, Beams for push notifications.

name: Ably
description: Realtime messaging infrastructure as a service. Pub/sub, presence, message history, and guaranteed delivery.

name: SignalR
description: Real-time web library for .NET. Adds server-to-client push with WebSocket, SSE, and long-polling fallbacks.

name: Phoenix Channels
description: Real-time communication layer in Elixir's Phoenix framework. Scales to millions of connections via BEAM/OTP.

name: Centrifugo
description: Scalable real-time messaging server. Language-agnostic with WebSocket, SSE, and GRPC transports.

name: Mercure
description: Open protocol and server for real-time push via Server-Sent Events. Built on HTTP standards, no WebSocket required.

name: NATS
description: Cloud-native messaging system for distributed applications. Pub/sub, request-reply, and JetStream persistence.

name: Stripe
description: Payment processing API for internet businesses. Cards, subscriptions, invoicing, and Connect for marketplaces.

name: Twilio
description: Cloud communications API. Programmable SMS, voice, video, and email via SendGrid. Powers app-to-user messaging.

name: SendGrid
description: Email delivery API by Twilio. Transactional and marketing email at scale with analytics and templates.

name: Mapbox
description: Custom maps and location services API. Geocoding, directions, navigation, and beautiful map styles.

name: Cloudflare
description: CDN, DDoS protection, DNS, and edge computing platform. Workers for serverless, R2 for storage, Pages for hosting.

name: Vercel
description: Frontend deployment platform. Git-push deploys, edge functions, and the creators of Next.js.

name: Supabase
description: Open-source Firebase alternative. Postgres database, auth, storage, edge functions, and realtime subscriptions.

name: Firebase
description: Google's app development platform. Realtime database, auth, hosting, cloud functions, and analytics.

name: Resend
description: Modern email API for developers. Send transactional emails with React Email templates and high deliverability.

name: Plaid
description: Fintech API connecting apps to users' bank accounts. Account verification, transactions, and identity data.

name: imgix
description: Real-time image processing and CDN. Resize, crop, optimize, and transform images via URL parameters.

name: PlanetScale
description: Serverless MySQL platform with branching, non-blocking schema changes, and Vitess-powered horizontal scaling.

name: Neon
description: Serverless Postgres with branching, autoscaling, and a generous free tier. Separates storage and compute.

name: UploadThing
description: File upload service for TypeScript apps. Type-safe API, built-in UI components, and S3-compatible storage.

name: Hugo
description: Blazing-fast static site generator written in Go. Builds thousands of pages in seconds with flexible templating.

name: Gatsby
description: React-based static site generator with GraphQL data layer. Plugin ecosystem for CMS, images, and SEO.

name: Jekyll
description: Static site generator built in Ruby. Markdown to HTML with Liquid templates. Powers GitHub Pages natively.

name: Eleventy
description: Simpler static site generator for JavaScript. Template-language agnostic, zero client-side JS by default.

name: Astro
description: Content-focused web framework that ships zero JS by default. Supports React, Vue, Svelte components as islands.

name: Zola
description: Fast static site generator in a single Rust binary. Built-in Sass compilation, syntax highlighting, and search.

name: Pelican
description: Python-powered static site generator. Writes content in Markdown or reStructuredText with Jinja2 templates.

name: Docusaurus
description: React-based documentation site generator by Meta. Versioned docs, blog, search, and i18n out of the box.

name: Bridgetown
description: Progressive site generator for Ruby. Modern successor to Jekyll with components, plugins, and Roda-based server.

name: Lume
description: Static site generator for Deno. Supports multiple template engines, fast builds, and simple plugin system.

name: Hexo
description: Fast, simple blog-focused static site generator for Node.js. One-command deploy to GitHub Pages and other hosts.

name: WordPress
description: Most widely used CMS powering over 40% of the web. Thousands of themes and plugins for any type of site.

name: Ghost
description: Modern publishing CMS focused on professional blogging and newsletters. Built-in memberships and subscriptions.

name: Strapi
description: Open-source headless CMS built with Node.js. Customizable API, admin panel, and role-based access control.

name: Sanity
description: Structured content platform with a real-time collaborative editing studio. Content delivered via GROQ or GraphQL API.

name: Contentful
description: API-first content platform for digital teams. Structured content models, CDN delivery, and rich editing UI.

name: Directus
description: Open-source data platform that wraps any SQL database with a REST and GraphQL API plus an admin dashboard.

name: Payload CMS
description: TypeScript-first headless CMS and application framework. Code-defined schemas, auth, access control, and admin UI.

name: KeystoneJS
description: Programmable GraphQL API backend and CMS for Node.js. Schema-driven with admin UI, access control, and relationships.

name: Cockpit
description: Self-hosted headless CMS with a simple API. Lightweight, flexible content structures, and built-in asset management.

name: Decap CMS
description: Git-based CMS for static site generators. Provides a rich editing UI that commits directly to your Git repository.

name: Drupal
description: Enterprise-grade open-source CMS. Powerful content modeling, workflows, multilingual support, and access control.

name: Wagtail
description: Django-based CMS with a streamlined editing experience. StreamField for flexible content, built-in image handling.

name: Ethereum
description: Decentralized blockchain platform for smart contracts and dApps. The most widely used programmable blockchain with the largest developer ecosystem.

name: Solana
description: High-performance blockchain for decentralized apps and crypto. Sub-second finality, low fees, and parallel transaction processing.

name: Hardhat
description: Ethereum development environment for compiling, testing, and deploying smart contracts. Rust-powered Solidity tests and extensible plugin system.

name: Foundry
description: Fast Ethereum development toolkit written in Rust. Includes Forge (build/test), Cast (CLI), Anvil (local node), and Chisel (Solidity REPL).

name: MetaMask
description: Crypto wallet browser extension and mobile app. Manages Ethereum accounts, interacts with dApps, and supports token swaps and staking.

name: Remix IDE
description: Browser-based IDE for Solidity smart contract development. Built-in compiler, debugger, and deployment tools with no setup required.

name: OpenZeppelin
description: Industry-standard library of reusable, audited smart contracts for Ethereum. Tokens, access control, governance, and security utilities.

name: Jinja2
description: Fast, expressive template engine for Python. Sandboxed execution, automatic HTML escaping, and template inheritance. Powers Flask and Ansible.

name: Handlebars
description: Mustache-compatible template engine for JavaScript. Compiles templates to functions for fast rendering with helpers and partials.

name: EJS
description: Embedded JavaScript templating for Node.js. Plain JavaScript syntax with no new language to learn, integrates directly with Express.

name: Pug
description: Whitespace-sensitive template engine for Node.js. Clean indentation-based syntax, mixins, includes, and template inheritance.

name: Mustache
description: Logic-less template system available in 50+ languages. Minimal syntax enforcing clean separation of logic and presentation.

name: Liquid
description: Safe, customer-facing template language created by Shopify. Powers Shopify themes and Jekyll. Designed for untrusted template authors.

name: Twig
description: Flexible, fast template engine for PHP. Compiles to optimized PHP code with automatic output escaping and sandboxing. Used by Symfony.
